ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the client account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the client account (e.g., active, suspended, terminated) */,
  "billing_info" TEXT /* JSON column to store billing information (e.g., plan, payment method, billing cycle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the application belongs to */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the application */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., active, paused, deleted) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "monitoring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the application is monitored (e.g., every 5 minutes, every 15 minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "http_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the request was made to */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the request belongs to */,
  "url_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the URL group the request belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the request */,
  "elapsed" INTEGER /* Elapsed time of the request */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the request */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* Response code of the request */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Response message of the request */,
  "thread_name" TEXT /* Thread name of the request */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the request */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Success status of the request */,
  "failure_message" TEXT /* Failure message of the request */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the client making the request */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "method" TEXT /* HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST, PUT) */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* JSON column to store the request body (if applicable) */,
  "request_headers" TEXT /* JSON column to store the request headers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_http_requests_url_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_group_id") REFERENCES url_groups ("url_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_http_requests_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_http_requests_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threads" (
  "thread_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thread */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the thread was used for */,
  "thread_name" TEXT /* Name of the thread */,
  "group_threads" INTEGER /* Number of group threads */,
  "all_threads" INTEGER /* Number of all threads */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the thread was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the thread */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thread_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threads_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES http_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the response was received for */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* Response code of the response */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Response message of the response */,
  "bytes" INTEGER /* Number of bytes received */,
  "sent_bytes" INTEGER /* Number of bytes sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the response was received */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the response */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* JSON column to store the response body (if applicable) */,
  "response_headers" TEXT /* JSON column to store the response headers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES http_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the dashboard (e.g., performance, usage) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* JSON column to store the layout of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., performance, usage) */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the alert */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "latencies" (
  "latency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each latency */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the latency was experienced for */,
  "latency" INTEGER /* Latency value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the latency was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the latency record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("latency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_latencies_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES http_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "idle_times" (
  "idle_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each idle time */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the idle time was experienced for */,
  "idle_time" INTEGER /* Idle time value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the idle time was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the idle time record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("idle_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_idle_times_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES http_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connect_times" (
  "connect_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connect time */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the connect time was experienced for */,
  "connect_time" INTEGER /* Connect time value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the connect time was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the connect time record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connect_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connect_times_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES http_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "url_groups" (
  "url_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL group */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the URL group belongs to */,
  "url_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the URL group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the URL group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the URL group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the URL group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_url_groups_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "url_group_urls" (
  "url_group_url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the URL group the URL belongs to */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the URL was added to the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the URL record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_group_url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_url_group_urls_url_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_group_id") REFERENCES url_groups ("url_group_id")
)
